_comment: Parity fixtures for deleteTag. Each fixture has existing tag rows, tag-use rows, a delete request, the returned value, and the expected remaining rows after delete.

input.tags: Existing rows from the `tags` table. Fields: id, name.
input.recipe_tag_map: Existing recipe tag rows. Fields: id, recipe_id, tag_id.
input.ingredient_variant_tag_map: Existing ingredient variant tag rows. Fields: id, ingredient_variant_id, tag_id.
input.request: Object passed to deleteTag. Field: id.

schema.expected: Object returned by deleteTag, per js/data/contracts/deleteTag.md.
schema.expectedState: Rows that should remain after delete.

fixtures.name: 01-delete-unused-tag
fixtures.description: Delete one tag and keep a different tag.

fixtures.name: 02-delete-used-tag
fixtures.description: Delete one tag and remove all recipe and ingredient-variant links to it.

fixtures.name: 03-delete-missing-tag
fixtures.description: Deleting a valid id that is already gone succeeds and leaves existing rows alone.
